location: Main Auditorium, Itahari International College Campus
title: Global Tech & Innovation Summit 2024
description: Join industry leaders and leading academics for a full day of keynotes, workshops, and networking focused on the latest trends in technology and innovation.
content:
Itahari International College (IIC) is proud to announce the Global Tech & Innovation Summit 2024. This landmark event brings together the brightest minds in technology to discuss the future of AI, Cloud Computing, and Sustainable Innovation.

Event Highlights

  • Keynote speeches from industry pioneers.
  • Interactive workshops on Emerging Technologies.
  • Networking sessions with global tech recruiters.
  • Student Innovation Showcase.

The summit aims to inspire the next generation of innovators and provide a platform for meaningful dialogue between academia and industry. Whether you are a student, a professional, or a tech enthusiast, this is an event you cannot afford to miss.

title: Itahari International College Partners with Microsoft for Cloud Computing Initiative
description: We are thrilled to announce a strategic partnership with Microsoft to provide our students with cutting-edge resources and certifications in Azure cloud computing.
content:
Itahari International College is taking a giant leap forward in IT education through its new partnership with Microsoft. This collaboration will integrate Microsoft Azure certifications directly into our computing curriculum.

Key Benefits

  • Free access to Microsoft Azure for students.
  • Official certification pathways.
  • Hands-on workshops led by Microsoft experts.

By providing students with industry-standard tools and certifications, we are ensuring they graduate with the practical skills required by the global job market.

title: Alumni Networking Mixer: Business & Finance
description: Connect with successful Itahari International College alumni working in the business and finance sectors. A great opportunity for current students to find mentors and explore career paths.
content:
The annual Alumni Networking Mixer returns this November, focusing on the vibrant sectors of Business and Finance. This event is designed to foster professional relationships between our current students and established alumni.

Agenda

  • Opening remarks by the Principal.
  • Panel discussion: 'Trends in Modern Finance'.
  • Speed mentoring sessions.
  • Cocktail networking hour.

Networking is a crucial component of career success. This mixer provides a safe and professional environment for students to practice their networking skills and gain valuable industry insights from those who have walked the path before them.

title: Spring 2025 Intake Application Deadline
description: Prospective students are reminded that the final deadline for the Spring 2025 intake is fast approaching. Ensure all documents are submitted early.
content:
Attention all prospective students! The deadline for Spring 2025 applications is now set for October 30th, 2024. We encourage all applicants to complete their submissions as early as possible to ensure priority consideration for scholarships.

Submission Checklist

  • Completed online application form.
  • Certified copies of academic transcripts.
  • Proof of English proficiency.
  • Statement of Purpose.

For any assistance with your application, please visit our Admissions Office or contact us via our online support portal.

title: Student Project Wins National Innovation Award
description: A team of final-year BSc (Hons) Computing students has won first place at the National Tech Innovation Awards for their smart agriculture project.
content:
Innovation is at the heart of Itahari International College, and our students continue to prove it. A group of our final-year Computing students recently secured the top spot at the National Tech Innovation Awards with their groundbreaking 'AgriTech-Sense' project.

The Winning Project

The project uses IoT sensors and machine learning to optimize irrigation and monitor crop health in real-time, significantly reducing water waste and increasing yields for local farmers.

"Our students' success is a testament to the hands-on, project-based learning approach we champion at Itahari International College. We are incredibly proud of their achievement." - HOD, Computing
